pr.title: Legal TTT (SGD, 3-epoch) + SLOT (lr=0.003, steps=5) on PR #549 base -- val_bpb: 1.11512 (3-seed mean, beats merged SOTA 1.1194)

output.summary: Stacks SLOT’s per-batch output-delta optimization (5 AdamW steps) atop Legal TTT, keeping the transformer frozen while reusing a single forward pass per chunk.
techniques: SLOT delta tuned via 5-step AdamW on final projection
Single frozen forward with delta-only gradients
